_description: Rolled after winning missions as directed by mission rules. Some finds give bonuses for having a scientist or scout still standing at end of battle.

entries.name: Scientific curiosities
entries.description: You collect samples that would be of interest to the research team.

entries.name: Building materials
entries.description: You find a cache of valuable materials that you can dispatch a team to collect.

entries.name: Hints of planetary history
entries.description: You find ruins, artifacts, or signs that could help unveil the history of this world.

entries.name: By the book victory
entries.description: Despite some hardships, it was a solid mission, and everyone performed well. Pick one character to have been the cornerstone behind it all.

entries.name: Decisive victory
entries.description: Success in the field will no doubt reassure the colonists.

entries.name: Ancient Sign
entries.description: You dig up an artifact of decidedly unknown origin.
